decisions.name: Use a service registry for service discovery
decisions.rationale: To ensure scalability and availability, use a service registry to manage service instances and enable dynamic service discovery.

decisions.name: Implement load balancing for each service
decisions.rationale: To achieve high availability and medium latency, implement load balancing for each service to distribute incoming traffic and prevent any single point of failure.

decisions.name: Use a message broker for communication between services
decisions.rationale: To ensure strong consistency and high reliability, use a message broker to enable asynchronous communication between services and decouple them from each other.

decisions.name: Implement authentication and authorization for each service
decisions.rationale: To ensure medium security, implement authentication and authorization for each service to restrict access to authorized users and prevent unauthorized access.

decisions.name: Use a database with strong consistency for critical data
decisions.rationale: To ensure strong consistency and high reliability, use a database with strong consistency for critical data such as user information and borrowing history.

decisions.name: Use a caching layer for read-heavy operations
decisions.rationale: To achieve medium latency and high availability, use a caching layer for read-heavy operations such as searching and browsing books to reduce the load on the database.

decisions.name: Implement a notification service for due date notifications
decisions.rationale: To ensure high reliability and strong consistency, implement a notification service to send due date notifications to library members and decouple it from the borrowing service.

critique.description: Cascading failures due to event-flow relationships between services could impact the overall availability of the system.
Data inconsistencies due to data-flow relationships between services could impact the overall reliability and consistency of the system.
Inconsistent state across components due to event-flow relationships between services could impact the overall consistency of the system.
